debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
L : Type u_2
inst✝¹⁵ : Field K
inst✝¹⁴ : Field L
inst✝¹³ : Algebra K L
inst✝¹² : NumberField K
inst✝¹¹ : NumberField L
V : Type u_3
inst✝¹⁰ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝⁹ : Module L V
inst✝⁸ : Module K V
inst✝⁷ : IsScalarTower K L V
inst✝⁶ : FiniteDimensional L V
inst✝⁵ : FiniteDimensional K V
B : Type u_4
inst✝⁴ : Ring B
inst✝³ : Algebra K B
inst✝² : FiniteDimensional K B
inst✝¹ : Module ℚ V
inst✝ : FiniteDimensional ℚ V
φ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V
⊢ ∀ᶠ (i : IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum (RingOfIntegers ℚ)) in Filter.cofinite,
    Set.BijOn
      ⇑((fun v =>
            ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv
              (@Aux.continuousBaseChange V inst✝¹⁰ inst✝¹ inst✝ (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.commRing (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v)))
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.instAlgebraAdicCompletion (RingOfIntegers ℚ) ℚ v)
                (UniformSpace.Completion.uniformSpace
                    (WithVal (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v))).toTopologicalSpace
                ⋯ φ))
          i)
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝¹⁰ inst✝¹ i)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        i).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range
      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝¹⁰ inst✝¹ i)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ
                        i).subtype.toAddMonoidHom.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range

failed_attempts:
let bQ := Basis.map b (Submodule.subtype (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)) |>.map
        (LinearEquiv.ofTop _ (IntegralLattice.span_rat_eq_top _ _ _))
      have h (ψ : V ≃ₗ[ℚ] V) : ∀ᶠ v in Filter.cofinite, Set.MapsTo (continuousBaseChange (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v) ψ)
          (((Aux.c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
            (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v).subtype.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range)
          (((Aux.c_v_alg V v).toAddMonoidHom.comp (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
            (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ v).subtype.toIntLinearMap).toAddMonoidHom).range) := by
        let M := LinearMap.toMatrix bQ bQ ψ
        have : {v | ∃ i j, v.valuation (M i j) < 0}.Finite := by
          apply Set.Finite.biUnion (Set.toFinite _) (fun i _ => Set.Finite.biUnion (Set.toFinite _) (fun j _ => _))
          exact IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.set_valuation_lt_zero_finite _
        filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr this] with v hv x hx
        simp only [AddMonoidHom.coe_comp, AddMonoidHom.coe_coe, LinearMap.coe_toAddMonoidHom,
          Function.comp_apply, LinearMap.mem_range, LinearMap.lTensor_tmul,
          Submodule.coe_subtype, c_v_alg, LinearEquiv.trans_apply,
          Module.Basis.baseChangeEquiv'_apply, Module.TensorProduct.comm_tmul] at hx ⊢
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := hx
        use y
        -- Note: this proof is slightly abstract because c_v_alg maps basis to basis
        -- The condition `val(M_ij) >= 0` ensures the matrix of ψ in bQ preserves the R_v-span.
        -- Since `c_v_alg` maps `L ⊗ R_v` to `Span R_v (bQ)`, and ψ is represented by M in bQ,
        -- ψ preserves `Span R_v (bQ)`.
        apply (Submodule.mem_span_iff_repr_mem bQ _ _).mpr at hy
        apply (Submodule.mem_span_iff_repr_mem bQ _ _).mpr
        intro i
        rw [← LinearMap.toMatrix_mulVec_repr bQ bQ ψ]
        apply Submodule.sum_mem
        intro j _
        apply Submodule.mul_mem
        · rw [IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.val_le_one_iff_val_ge_zero]; exact (not_exists.mp (not_exists.mp hv i) j)
        · exact hy j
      apply (h φ).mp ((h φ.symm).mono fun v hinv hfwd => ⟨hfwd, hinv⟩)))
